# Bundled font assets (tests & examples)

These font files are used **only by the test suite and the runnable examples**
— they are not compiled into the library and are not part of its functional
code. (The functional render-substitute fonts live in `../fonts/` and are
covered by `../fonts/LICENSE.txt`.)

Each font here is distributed under its **own** license, **not** the
repository's MIT license, which covers the source code only.

- `SourceSerif4-Regular.otf` — Adobe Source Serif 4, under the
  **SIL Open Font License 1.1**. Full text: `SourceSerif4-Regular.LICENSE.txt`.
- Other font files are governed by their respective upstream licenses.
